# Nested vault root CLAUDE (N1 bait)

This vault-root `CLAUDE.md` is the basename-collision BAIT for N1. A deep source
under `repos/projA/design/` writes a bare `` `CLAUDE.md` §X `` pointer meaning
its OWN project-root doc (out of vault scope) — NOT this file. The old
`cand_root = kb_root/CLAUDE.md` resolver collided here and heading-mismatch
false-flagged. This file deliberately does NOT carry an `X` heading.
